description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface and deep black seams forming a classic eight-panel pattern. The ball is spherical and appears to be made of synthetic or composite leather, designed for grip and durability during play. The surface is matte with a slightly grippy feel, and the seams are recessed, providing tactile feedback for handling. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or signs of wear, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the views, suggesting it is positioned away from the camera or seamlessly integrated. The basketball is typical in size and appearance for use in urban parks, gyms, or street courts.
description: A classic orange basketball with black seams and a textured, matte surface, showing no visible logos or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basketball's eight-panel pattern with intersecting black seams and a prominent pebbled texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous black seam encircling the ball and the smooth, unmarked orange surface.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the mirrored panel pattern and deep black seams, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, with the black seam running horizontally and no visible markings.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel pattern with deep black seams forming curved and straight segments, typical of regulation basketballs.
